title: Developing business strategy
summary: 9609 A Level — SWOT, mission, and strategic choice.

simpleExplanation.title: Choosing where to compete
simpleExplanation.summary: Strategy is long-term direction. PESTLE and SWOT inform choices about markets, products, and capabilities.

sections.content: **Developing strategy** (6.2.1) uses **6.1 PESTLE** inputs. Build **SWOT from case evidence only**.
